# 🎉 Welcome to the Irium Community!

Welcome to the official Irium blockchain community discussions!

## About Irium

Irium is a **SHA-256d Proof-of-Work blockchain** with **8 unique innovations** designed for security, scalability, and decentralization.

### Key Features

✅ **Zero-DNS Bootstrap** - Network-level censorship resistance  
✅ **Self-healing Peer Discovery** - Robust network topology  
✅ **Genesis Vesting** - Transparent founder allocation with on-chain CLTV  
✅ **Relay Rewards** - Incentivized transaction propagation  
✅ **Sybil Resistance** - PoW-based handshake protection  
✅ **Anchor Consensus** - Eclipse attack prevention  
✅ **Light Clients** - SPV and NiPoPoW support  
✅ **Metadata Commitments** - On-chain data verification  

## 🚀 Getting Started

### Run a Node
```bash
wget https://github.com/iriumlabs/irium/releases/download/v1.0.0/irium-bootstrap-v1.0.0.tar.gz
tar -xzf irium-bootstrap-v1.0.0.tar.gz
cd irium-bootstrap-v1.0.0
./install.sh
python3 scripts/irium-node.py
```

### Create a Wallet
```bash
python3 scripts/irium-wallet-proper.py new
python3 scripts/irium-wallet-proper.py address
```

### Start Mining
```bash
python3 scripts/irium-miner.py
```

## 🤝 How to Contribute

We welcome contributions! Check out our [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/iriumlabs/irium/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).

Ways to contribute:
- 🏃 Run a node
- ⛏️ Mine IRM
- 💻 Submit code improvements
- 📚 Improve documentation
- 🐛 Report bugs
- 💡 Share ideas

## 📋 Discussion Categories

- **📢 Announcements** - Official updates and news
- **🙋 Q&A** - Ask questions and get help
- **💡 Ideas** - Share feature requests and ideas
- **⛏️ Mining** - Mining discussions and optimizations
- **💰 Wallets & Transactions** - Wallet and transaction help
- **🌐 Network & Nodes** - Node operation discussions
- **🛠️ Development** - Technical development topics
- **📊 General** - Community chat and introductions
